itemListElement.reviewBody: My daughter studying from past 4 years. I feel KRM was very good in student safety. I much appreciate on this. Keep on follow this.  They are giving extra curriculum for kids like art drawing yogo and sports. It was so nice. Keep rock KRM.

itemReviewed.name: KRM Public School - State Bank Colony,Perambur

itemListElement.reviewBody: Get to to know the renowned school like KRM we are over the moon to get the admission to my child in KRM public school but when we came to know about the staff  from English department who is keep on harrassing us mentally and her father. The school with such teacher cannot bring good students. Because if this we have stopped thinking to admit our child in KRM public. We just recalled our admission process Bcoz will this kind of teachers will not teach the children good manners.

itemReviewed.name: KRM Public School - State Bank Colony,Perambur

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Attended a sports day function at this school, which was very poorly conducted. No sufficient chairs provided for the parents who turned up to support their children. Over hundreds of parents and elderly along with children remained standing and waiting for their wards performance to be over.

It is the responsibility of the school to ensure the comfortable seating of parents too who wait for over 3 hours for the even to be over.

This shows the responsibility of the school towards the well being of the parents too.

itemReviewed.name: KRM Public School - State Bank Colony,Perambur

itemListElement.reviewBody:
My daughter is in grade 10 of Villivakkam branch . Teaching and teachers are excellent One worst experience which i had was admin staff casual approach without knowing exam timing just that like they are conveying Today 29.9.2023 she is not well i  called to office and told them she is unwell yesterday sever fever she has her exam so i am sending her to write her exam once the exam is over u can i will come and pick her . Admin madam told me to send a letter . 10.30 again i called her she told exam will get over at 12.30 pm . Then i am confused about the timing because my daughter didn't had her breakfast because of fever . Around 11.30 i received call admin madam told she is ok send her lunch . I went packing lunch  i told them i brought lunch but allow my chld to home she told no mam i need ask principal mafam then they told we can't allow . These people making us stressed. Then i called my husband he came and there was a casoure and quarrel .
I didn't understand we all are educated my daughter she won't take leave so far hardly 1 or 2 days . All these things happned only because of miss communication from  admin people .if she told the correct timing of exam we parent's won't get confuced .

itemReviewed.name: KRM Public School - State Bank Colony,Perambur

itemListElement.reviewBody: Please update that diffrent locations of the school in Google, we have bad experience to attend Hindi exam that KRM public location shows only in perambur not other branches at one Google search. We end up in different centre instead of villivakkam. Pls do the needful to avoid confusion.

itemReviewed.name: KRM Public School - State Bank Colony,Perambur

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Would like to express my Sincere Thanks & Gratitude for the exemplary support you have provided to my son A.Barathraj Studying in your good school in class X-D, when he got injured on 10th April 2023 in the critical need of hour.
.
I am deeply touched with for the support you have provided to my Child and appreciate your dedication.
.
The difference you’re making is immeasurable.
.
Thanks for being the guiding light, and always being nice to my Child & everything that you do.
.
We feel so blessed to have such a caring Teachers in your school.
.
When I shared this experience in my workplace, everyone wondered & appreciated your excellent service minded approach demonstrated by the school and all the staff.
.
Special thanks to “The Principal – (Mr.Sivasakti Balan)” who have personally involved and ensured proper treatment till my son was dropped back to home safely.
.
Kindly convey our Thanks to the Principal & The Management.

Warm Regards,

Arulmani R
